message:
fmt: apply rustfmt to source and test modules, remove stray #[test] attributes

Mechanical formatting pass across ~150 source and test files:
- Break long assert!/assert_eq!/assert!(matches!(...)) calls across lines
- Wrap long function arguments and struct construction to line-width limits
- Re-sort use imports alphabetically (Rust 2024 edition style)
- Expand single-line struct literals to multi-line where needed
- Remove 21 orphaned #[test] attributes sitting above comment blocks
  rather than above actual test functions (bulkhead, gc, checkpoint, etc.)

No semantic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
